output.edit_description: Add 'L1 Attribution Tracking Requirements' section to GOVERNANCE.md
patch_commands:
sed -i '/^## L1 Attribution Tracking Requirements$/a

### L1 Attribution Tracking Requirements

- Implement L1 attribution tracking for all LLM outputs
- Log attribution metrics per user session
- Audit model performance against L1 standards'
echo 'Added L1 Attribution Tracking Requirements section to GOVERNANCE.md'
validation_commands: test -f GOVERNANCE.md && grep -q 'L1 Attribution Tracking Requirements' GOVERNANCE.md
output.expected_outcome: GOVERNANCE.md now contains a section titled 'L1 Attribution Tracking Requirements' with concrete requirements for LLM output attribution.
output.risk_notes: No security risks. Requires careful review of L1 standards compliance.
